title: [MooreToCore] Crash with sqrt/floor
body:
It failed when trying to compile https://github.com/pulp-platform/ELAU/blob/b0d113aff6a2d800076f5ebb84f09fba93625bc7/src/SqrtArrUns.sv#L96-L105. 
```
moore.module @behavioural_SqrtArrUns(in %X : !moore.l8, out Q : !moore.l4, out R : !moore.l4) {
  %0 = moore.constant 2 : l8
  %1 = moore.conversion %X : !moore.l8 -> !moore.real
  %2 = moore.builtin.sqrt %1 : real
  %3 = moore.builtin.floor %2 : real
  %4 = moore.conversion %3 : !moore.real -> !moore.l4
  %5 = moore.zext %4 : l4 -> l8
  %6 = moore.powu %5, %0 : l8
  %7 = moore.sub %X, %6 : l8
  %8 = moore.trunc %7 : l8 -> l4
  moore.output %4, %8 : !moore.l4, !moore.l4
}
```

```
[circt-verilog] Running "convert-moore-to-core"
circt-verilog: /home/uenoku/dev/circt-synth/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:650: decltype(auto) llvm::dyn_cast(const From &) [To = mlir::IntegerType, From = mlir::Type]: Assertion `detail::isPresent(Val) && "dyn_cast on a non-existent value"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: circt-verilog ../out/SqrtArrUns_behavioral.sv -o build/SqrtArrUns_behavioral/circt/SqrtArrUns_behavioral.mlir --mlir-timing -y ../out ../ext/ELAU/src/arith_utils.sv -mlir-print-ir-after-all -verbose-pass-executions
```
